site_engineering.headline: This site is its own case study in secure, governed delivery.
site_engineering.lede: These pages are generated from validated JSON and shipped through the same controls I build for clients — a multi-stage release gate, supply-chain governance, and AI-assisted change control where deterministic checks decide and a human approves the risk.

items.title: Generated, never hand-edited
items.detail: Source templates and structured JSON compile to committed HTML through one Node build. A CI check fails the pipeline if the generated pages ever drift from their source.

items.title: A fourteen-step release gate
items.detail: One command runs build, generated-drift, security and content tests, performance and telemetry budgets, link health, dependency audit, vendor governance, integration and accessibility checks.

items.title: AI plans, a human approves
items.detail: An assistant workflow can read context and propose plans but cannot mint write tokens. Execution runs only after a reviewer approves a specific plan by id — deterministic checks decide, humans own the risk.

items.title: Supply-chain governance
items.detail: Vendored browser scripts are pinned by manifest, verified against recorded hashes and upstream sources, and gated in CI by dependency review and automated update PRs.

items.title: A narrow browser runtime
items.detail: A strict Content-Security-Policy with hashed inline scripts, self-hosted fonts and assets, blocked framing, and a tested service worker keep the client attack surface small.

items.title: Content checked like code
items.detail: Every public claim is JSON validated for shape, length, URL scheme, and asset path before it renders, and CodeQL plus a custom Node test suite scan the code on every push.

contact.headline: Open to impactful platform, security, and responsible AI work.
